title: Cookie preferences
intro: We use cookies to run the site and, with your consent, to improve it. Choose which categories to allow.

categories.label: Strictly necessary
categories.description: Required for core features like signing in and security. Cannot be switched off.

categories.label: Functional
categories.description: Remember your choices, such as language and region.

categories.label: Analytics
categories.description: Help us understand how the site is used so we can improve it.

categories.label: Marketing
categories.description: Used to show you more relevant ads on other sites.
